specific_question: By September 15, 2025, how many Elexion Automotive legacy combustion-engine diagnostic tools had Olivia Martinez and her asset lifecycle team decommissioned across all the company's facilities?
answer: According to company records, by September 15, 2025, Olivia's team had decommissioned 740 diagnostic tools in Elexion Automotive plants that were no longer compatible with EV assembly systems.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?
